# leifwind Provider

Manage leifwind metadata (projects, entities, fields) via the metadata API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    leifwind = {
      source = "leifwind-io/leifwind"
    }
  }
}

# Delegated/static token (runner path):
provider "leifwind" {
  endpoint = "https://api.leifwind.example"
  token    = var.leifwind_token # or LEIFWIND_TOKEN
}

# Alternative — client_credentials (operator/M2M path):
# provider "leifwind" {
#   endpoint      = "https://api.leifwind.example"
#   issuer        = "https://auth.leifwind.example"   # LEIFWIND_OIDC_ISSUER
#   client_id     = "…"                               # LEIFWIND_CLIENT_ID
#   client_secret = var.client_secret                 # LEIFWIND_CLIENT_SECRET
#   audience      = "326102453042806786"              # LEIFWIND_OIDC_AUDIENCE
# }
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `audience` (String) ZITADEL API project id (audience scope). Falls back to LEIFWIND_OIDC_AUDIENCE.
- `client_id` (String) OAuth client id. Falls back to LEIFWIND_CLIENT_ID.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) OAuth client secret. Falls back to LEIFWIND_CLIENT_SECRET.
- `endpoint` (String) Backend base URL. Falls back to LEIFWIND_ENDPOINT.
- `issuer` (String) ZITADEL issuer URL for client_credentials. Falls back to LEIFWIND_OIDC_ISSUER.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Static bearer token (delegated/runner path). Falls back to LEIFWIND_TOKEN. Mutually exclusive with issuer/client_id/client_secret.
